title: Flex (FLEX) Upgraded to Strong Buy: Here's Why

title: Flex Ltd. (FLEX) Q3 2022 Earnings Call Transcript

title: Flex (FLEX) Tops Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Flex (FLEX) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 23.53% and 7.87%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Reasons to Retain FLEX Stock in Your Portfolio at the Moment
text: FLEX is benefiting from strength across the Agility Solutions and Reliability Solutions segments, along with a solid end-market focus on the back of emerging opportunities.
